---
title: "Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation"
description: "Book overview and chapter-level study-note index for Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation."
book_id: "handbook-practical-program-evaluation"
collection_id: "evaluation-texts"
note_type: "Book"
citation_key: "newcomer_hatry_wholey_2015_handbook_practical_program_evaluation"
evidence_ids:
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch01-chapter-1-planning-and-designing-useful-evaluations:c0003"
  - "table:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:table:table-1-1:p0069:r0254"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:part-1:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch02-chapter-2-analyzing-and-engaging-stakeholders:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch03-chapter-3-using-logic-models:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch04-chapter-4-exploratory-evaluation:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch05-chapter-5-performance-measurement:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch06-chapter-6-comparison-group-designs:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch07-chapter-7-randomized-controlled-trials:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch08-chapter-8-conducting-case-studies:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch09-chapter-9-recruitment-and-retention-of-study-participants:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch10-chapter-10-designing-managing-and-analyzing-multisite-evaluations:c0001"
source_status: "needs_review"
---
<div class="landing-stack">

::: {.landing-hero}
<span class="hero-eyebrow">Book notes</span>

# Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation

Chapter-level study notes on *Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation*
[@newcomer_hatry_wholey_2015_handbook_practical_program_evaluation]. These notes are generated from
source-linked MCP research-library records and are intended for study, comparison, and later
refinement.

<div class="page-metadata">
  <span>31 chapter notes</span>
  <span>2015</span>
  <span>Source status: needs_review</span>
  <span>MCP evaluation-texts</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.section-grid}
::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-synthesis">Synthesis</span>

### [Core Concepts](concepts.qmd)

Recurring ideas and distinctions used across these chapter notes.
:::

::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-map">Map</span>

### [Chapter Map](chapter-map.qmd)

Source chapters, page ranges, and reading routes.
:::

::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-practice">Practice</span>

### [Practice Implications](practice-implications.qmd)

Practical evaluation design habits drawn from the notes.
:::
:::

</div>

## Source

<div class="chapter-meta"><span>2015</span><span>MCP evaluation-texts</span><span>Status: needs_review</span><span>Book overview</span></div>

This index summarises generated chapter-level study notes for Kathryn E. Newcomer, Harry P. Hatry,
and Joseph S. Wholey's *Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation*
[@newcomer_hatry_wholey_2015_handbook_practical_program_evaluation]. The generated pages use
selected MCP research-library retrieval records and compact evidence summaries.

## Core Argument

Practical evaluation improves programs when evaluators align design, data collection, analysis, reporting, contracting, and use with real information needs and credible evidence standards.

## Chapter Notes


### Part 1: Evaluation Planning and Design

- [Chapter 1: Planning and Designing Useful Evaluations](chapter-01-planning-and-designing-useful-evaluations.qmd) - source pages 49-77
- [Chapter 2: Analyzing and Engaging Stakeholders](chapter-02-analyzing-and-engaging-stakeholders.qmd) - source pages 78-103
- [Chapter 3: Using Logic Models](chapter-03-using-logic-models.qmd) - source pages 104-129
- [Chapter 4: Exploratory Evaluation](chapter-04-exploratory-evaluation.qmd) - source pages 130-149
- [Chapter 5: Performance Measurement](chapter-05-performance-measurement.qmd) - source pages 150-178
- [Chapter 6: Comparison Group Designs](chapter-06-comparison-group-designs.qmd) - source pages 179-201
- [Chapter 7: Randomized Controlled Trials](chapter-07-randomized-controlled-trials.qmd) - source pages 202-224
- [Chapter 8: Conducting Case Studies](chapter-08-conducting-case-studies.qmd) - source pages 225-248
- [Chapter 9: Recruitment and Retention of Study Participants](chapter-09-recruitment-and-retention-of-study-participants.qmd) - source pages 249-267
- [Chapter 10: Designing, Managing, and Analyzing Multisite Evaluations](chapter-10-designing-managing-and-analyzing-multisite-evaluations.qmd) - source pages 268-299
- [Chapter 11: Evaluating Community Change Programs](chapter-11-evaluating-community-change-programs.qmd) - source pages 300-322
- [Chapter 12: Culturally Responsive Evaluation](chapter-12-culturally-responsive-evaluation.qmd) - source pages 323-357

### Part 2: Practical Data Collection Procedures

- [Chapter 13: Using Agency Records](chapter-13-using-agency-records.qmd) - source pages 367-384
- [Chapter 14: Using Surveys](chapter-14-using-surveys.qmd) - source pages 385-424
- [Chapter 15: Role Playing](chapter-15-role-playing.qmd) - source pages 425-453
- [Chapter 16: Using Ratings by Trained Observers](chapter-16-using-ratings-by-trained-observers.qmd) - source pages 454-487
- [Chapter 17: Collecting Data in the Field](chapter-17-collecting-data-in-the-field.qmd) - source pages 488-518
- [Chapter 18: Using the Internet](chapter-18-using-the-internet.qmd) - source pages 519-537
- [Chapter 19: Semi-Structured Interviews](chapter-19-semi-structured-interviews.qmd) - source pages 538-551
- [Chapter 20: Focus Group Interviewing](chapter-20-focus-group-interviewing.qmd) - source pages 552-576
- [Chapter 21: Using Stories in Evaluation](chapter-21-using-stories-in-evaluation.qmd) - source pages 577-597

### Part 3: Data Analysis

- [Chapter 22: Analyzing Qualitative Data](chapter-22-analyzing-qualitative-data.qmd) - source pages 603-635
- [Chapter 23: Using Statistics in Evaluation](chapter-23-using-statistics-in-evaluation.qmd) - source pages 636-677
- [Chapter 24: Cost-Effectiveness and Cost-Benefit Analysis](chapter-24-cost-effectiveness-and-cost-benefit-analysis.qmd) - source pages 678-714
- [Chapter 25: Meta-Analyses, Systematic Reviews, and Evaluation Syntheses](chapter-25-meta-analyses-systematic-reviews-and-evaluation-syntheses.qmd) - source pages 715-740

### Part 4: Use of Evaluation

- [Chapter 26: Pitfalls in Evaluations](chapter-26-pitfalls-in-evaluations.qmd) - source pages 745-776
- [Chapter 27: Writing Recommendations](chapter-27-writing-recommendations.qmd) - source pages 777-790
- [Chapter 28: Writing Evaluation Reports](chapter-28-writing-evaluation-reports.qmd) - source pages 791-806
- [Chapter 29: Contracting for Evaluation Products and Services](chapter-29-contracting-for-evaluation-products-and-services.qmd) - source pages 807-840
- [Chapter 30: Evaluation in Government and the Politics of Evaluation](chapter-30-evaluation-in-government-and-the-politics-of-evaluation.qmd) - source pages 841-857
- [Chapter 31: Evaluation Challenges, Issues, and Trends](chapter-31-evaluation-challenges-issues-and-trends.qmd) - source pages 858-874

## Legacy Extracts

- [Evaluation Planning and Design](section-01-planning-and-design.qmd)
- [Planning and Designing Useful Evaluations](section-02-planning-useful-evaluations.qmd)
- [Performance Measurement and Program Evaluation](section-03-performance-measurement.qmd)

## Source Records

- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch01-chapter-1-planning-and-designing-useful-evaluations:c0003`
- `table:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:table:table-1-1:p0069:r0254`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:part-1:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch02-chapter-2-analyzing-and-engaging-stakeholders:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch03-chapter-3-using-logic-models:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch04-chapter-4-exploratory-evaluation:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch05-chapter-5-performance-measurement:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch06-chapter-6-comparison-group-designs:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch07-chapter-7-randomized-controlled-trials:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch08-chapter-8-conducting-case-studies:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch09-chapter-9-recruitment-and-retention-of-study-participants:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch10-chapter-10-designing-managing-and-analyzing-multisite-evaluations:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch11-chapter-11-evaluating-community-change-programs:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch12-chapter-12-culturally-responsive-evaluation:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch13-chapter-13-using-agency-records:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:part-2:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch14-chapter-14-using-surveys:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch15-chapter-15-role-playing:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch16-chapter-16-using-ratings-by-trained-observers:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch17-chapter-17-collecting-data-in-the-field:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch18-chapter-18-using-the-internet:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch19-chapter-19-semi-structured-interviews:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch20-chapter-20-focus-group-interviewing:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch21-chapter-21-using-stories-in-evaluation:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch22-chapter-22-analyzing-qualitative-data:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:part-3:c0002`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch23-chapter-23-using-statistics-in-evaluation:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch24-chapter-24-cost-effectiveness-and-cost-benefit-analysis:c0023`
- `table_segment:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:table:table-24-6:p0695:r0254:s002`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch25-chapter-25-meta-analyses-systematic-reviews-and-evaluation-syntheses:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch26-chapter-26-pitfalls-in-evaluations:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:part-4:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch27-chapter-27-writing-recommendations:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch28-chapter-28-writing-evaluation-reports:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch29-chapter-29-contracting-for-evaluation-products-and-services:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch30-chapter-30-evaluation-in-government-and-the-politics-of-evaluation:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch31-chapter-31-evaluation-challenges-issues-and-trends:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch31-chapter-31-evaluation-challenges-issues-and-trends:c0009`

## References
